---
title: "01_GAM_survey_data"
output: html_document
---

# Setup

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| output: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show setup code"

# setup
librarian::shelf(tidyverse,  RPostgres, DBI, RIBBiTR-BII/ribbitrrr, dbplyr, janitor, here, brms, cmdstanr, tidybayes, patchwork)

```

# Data selection

## environmental
```{r}
env_agg = read_csv(here("data", "unified_env_agg.csv"))

```

## RACA
```{r}
raca_raw = read.csv(here("data", "JPSL_RACA_Swabbed_Individuals_2026-03-03.csv")) %>%
  clean_names()

met_med = raca_raw %>%
  filter(life_stage == "M",
         !is.na(svl_mm)) %>%
  summarize(mm = median(svl_mm))

raca_clean = raca_raw %>%
  filter(life_stage %in% c("A", "S", "Y", "M")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(site = site_name,
         body_mass_g = weight_g,
         site_utme = utme_site,
         site_utmn = utmn_site,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab = bd_swab_results_its) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
         life_stage_simple = case_when(
           life_stage == "M" ~ "metamorph",
           svl_mm >= 50 ~ "adult",
           svl_mm < 50 ~ "subadult"),
         svl_mm = if_else(life_stage_simple == "metamorph" & is.na(svl_mm), 25, svl_mm),
         site = tolower(gsub(" ", "_", site)),
         site_utm_zone = 11,  # verify
         population = site,
         region = "W",
         country = "usa",
         project = "RACA",
         taxon_capture = "rana_cascadae") %>%
  filter(!is.na(bd_its1_copies_per_swab))

raca_valid = raca_clean %>%
  select(taxon_capture,
         date,
         site,
         population,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab,
         life_stage_simple,
         life_stage,
         sex,
         svl_mm,
         body_mass_g,
         region,
         country,
         project)
```

# RAMU/RASI
```{r}
## Connect to DB
dbcon = hopToDB("ribbitr", hopReg = FALSE)

# table pointers
db_bd = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "bd_qpcr_results"))
db_sample = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "sample"))
db_capture = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "capture"))
db_survey = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "survey"))
db_visit = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "visit"))
db_site = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "site"))
db_region = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "region"))
db_country = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "country"))

# preliminary data
bd_sample = db_sample %>%
  right_join(db_capture, by = "capture_id") %>%
  left_join(db_survey, by = "survey_id") %>%
  left_join(db_visit, by = "visit_id") %>%
  left_join(db_site, by = "site_id") %>%
  left_join(db_region, by = "region_id") %>%
  left_join(db_country, by = "country_id") %>%
  filter(sample_type == "bd",
         taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa",
                              "rana_sierrae")) %>%
  inner_join(db_bd %>%
              filter(!is.na(bd_detected)) %>%
              group_by(sample_id) %>%
              slice_sample(n = 1) %>%
              ungroup() %>%
              select(sample_id,
                     bd_its1_copies_per_swab), by = "sample_id")

# load populations
site_year_pop = read.csv(here("data", "sn_resilience_trajectory_classification_pop_lookup_2026-02-28.csv")) %>%
  mutate(site = as.character(site))

# define life stage simple
bd_life_stage = bd_sample %>%
  filter(life_stage %in% c("adult",
                           "subadult",
                           NA) |
           tad_stage >= 44) %>%
  mutate(svl_mm = if_else(!is.na(tad_stage) & is.na(svl_mm), 25, svl_mm),
         life_stage_simple = case_when(
           !is.na(tad_stage) | svl_mm < 30 ~ "metamorph",
           (svl_mm >= 40) ~ "adult",
           (svl_mm < 40) ~ "subadult",
           .default = NA),
         svl_mm = if_else(life_stage_simple == "metamorph" & is.na(svl_mm), 25, svl_mm),
         year = year(date)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_stage_simple))

ranarasi_valid = bd_life_stage %>%
  filter(site %in% site_year_pop$site) %>%
  select(sample_id,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab,
         sample_name,
         capture_id,
         taxon_capture,
         life_stage,
         tad_stage,
         life_stage_simple,
         svl_mm,
         body_mass_g,
         sex,
         date,
         year,
         site,
         site_id,
         region,
         country) %>%
  collect() %>%
  left_join(site_year_pop, by = c("site", "year")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bd_its1_copies_per_swab)) %>%
  mutate(project = "MLRG")


```


# Combine data
```{r}
col_compare = compare_df_cols(ranarasi_valid,
                              raca_valid)

brms_data = bind_rows(ranarasi_valid,
                      raca_valid) %>%
  left_join(env_agg %>%
              select(date,
                     site,
                     precip_mm_30_day_sum,
                     temp_c_30_day_mean), by = c("site", "date")) %>%
  mutate(life_stage_simple = factor(life_stage_simple, levels = c("metamorph", "subadult", "adult")),
         is_metamorph = as.numeric(life_stage_simple == "metamorph"),
         is_not_metamorph = as.numeric(life_stage_simple != "metamorph"),
         bd_load_co = if_else(bd_its1_copies_per_swab < 10,
                              0,
                              bd_its1_copies_per_swab),
         bd_detected_co = bd_load_co > 0,
         bd_load_co_density = bd_load_co / svl_mm) %>%
  mutate(
    precip_mm_30_z = as.numeric(scale(precip_mm_30_day_sum, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    temp_c_30_z = as.numeric(scale(temp_c_30_day_mean, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    precip_mm_30_z2 = as.numeric(scale(precip_mm_30_day_sum ^ 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    temp_c_30_z2 = as.numeric(scale(temp_c_30_day_mean ^ 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)))

# check for good alignment with environmental data
env_alignment_check = any(is.na(brms_data$precip_mm_30_day_sum)) | any(is.na(brms_data$temp_c_30_day_mean))

save(brms_data, file = here("size_bd_gam", "intermediates", paste0("brms_data_gam_", today(), ".RData")))

```

# visualize size distributions
```{r}

ggplot(brms_data, aes(x = svl_mm, color = life_stage_simple)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap("taxon_capture")

```
